items.title: Mens Novelty Saint Patricks T Shirt Funny Irish Tees Cool Party Tees for Guys
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: mens, saint, patricks, irish, tees, party, guys. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
